suggestions.name: ContactsFull
suggestions.description: Access all of your contacts information

suggestions.name: FileProviderPresence
suggestions.description: Allow the app to see when you are using files managed by it?

suggestions.name: MediaLibrary
suggestions.description: Access Apple Music, your music and video activity, and your media library

suggestions.name: ScreenCapture
suggestions.description: Capture the contents of the system display

suggestions.name: SystemPolicyDesktopFolder
suggestions.description: Access files in your Desktop folder

suggestions.name: SystemPolicyDeveloperFiles
suggestions.description: Access a file used in Software Development

suggestions.name: SystemPolicyDocumentsFolder
suggestions.description: Access files in your Documents folder

suggestions.name: SystemPolicyDownloadsFolder
suggestions.description: Access files in your Downloads folder

suggestions.name: SystemPolicyNetworkVolumes
suggestions.description: Access files on a network volume

suggestions.name: SystemPolicyRemovableVolumes
suggestions.description: Access files on a removable volume

suggestions.name: Accessibility
suggestions.description: Allows app to control your compute

suggestions.name: ListenEvent
suggestions.description: Allow monitoring input from your keyboard

suggestions.name: DeveloperTool
suggestions.description: Allow app to run software that doesn't meet the system's security policy

script: mdfind kMDItemContentTypeTree=com.apple.application-bundle -onlyin /Applications | while read line; do echo $(mdls -name kMDItemCFBundleIdentifier -r "$line") $line; done
generators.js_source:
s=>{let e=new Map(s.split(`
`).map(n=>{let o=n.indexOf(" ");return[n.slice(0,o),n.slice(o+1)]}));e.delete("(null)");let i=[];for(let[n,o]of e.entries())i.push({name:n,description:o,icon:`fig://${o}`});return i}
